'''N'Zoth''' was a [[planet]]<ref name="RO World Locations" /> located in the [[N'zoth system]]<ref name="G&G" /> of the [[Koornacht Cluster]]<ref name="RO World Locations" /> in [[the galaxy]]'s [[Core Worlds]].<ref name="TFABG" /> On the periphery of the [[Deep Core]], it was connected via [[hyperspace route]] to [[Jedha]]<ref name="RO World Locations" /> and [[Coruscant]], and situated in square K-10 of the [[Standard Galactic Grid]].<ref name="TFABG" />

{{Planet-stub}}
